title: Simple Avatars
description: This mod adds some avatars (in book form)
body:
Simple Avatars

Simple Avatars adds four elemental books that grant you the powers of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth.
Each element possesses unique abilities and world interactions.
**This mod requires Curios API!**

_**Fire Book**_

When held in hand and you right-click, lava forms around you.

Turns water below you to stone.

When in lava, you have Night Vision.

Hitting an entity will set an entity on fire.

Can be worn in a Curios slot.

_**Water Book**_

When held, you can shoot water projectiles.

When equipped in a Curios slot, you cannot shoot water.

Turns lava below you to stone.

To use it safely, you must have a special water effect which is obtained when in water. Otherwise, you take damage when holding or equipping the book.

Can be equipped in a Curios slot.

_**Air Book**_

Right-click to fly for 10 seconds.

Hitting an entity gives levitation (to entity) .

_**Earth Book**_

Right-click to shoot a rock projectile with heavy knockback.
